title: [TACZ] Create: Precise Manufacturing
description: A Create Mod Addon that aims to incorporate automatable recipes using TaC Zero's mod items.
body:
![Create Precise Manufacturing Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773ddedb24071fe01b6fcbc3a06217793b3dec2f.png)

# Create: Precise Manufacturing (English)

> 如果需要看中译，往下翻

![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)
[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/Type-32/PreciseManufacturing)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/precise-manufacturing)
[![kofi-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Type-32)


A Create Mod Addon that aims to incorporate automatable recipes using TaC Zero's mod items. ***Up to date to TaCZ 1.1.4 for Minecraft 1.21.1!***

## Must Read (May 29, 2026)
The development of this mod will be at an irregular pace for several personal reasons. To whoever that wants to continue it, you can fork the mod's repository on GitHub and keep me in the attributions as the original author of this mod. Thanks.

To whoever that needs the automation recipes, I recommend several mods below that adds Create + TaCZ automation recipes with their own flavor:
- [Create: TaCZ Automation by TerraPixel](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tacz-automation)
- [Mecharmorer by hou_qin](https://modrinth.com/mod/mecharmorer) 
- [Create: Arms Race Reborn by hello_there, original by perl](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-arms-race-reborn)
- [Create: Immersive TaCZ Integration by MarcosJoestar](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-immersive-tacz-integration)

## Must Read (April 16, 2026)
Due to some requests, I've extracted recipes from the v0.4.4 Precise Manufacturing mod and packed them into a Datapack for Minecraft 1.21.1. For those who are confused about TaCZ not having a 1.21.1 port: this datapack is specifically for the unofficial TaCZ 1.21.1 Forge/NeoForge port.

An update for Precise Manufacturing will come soon for TaCZ 1.1.7 on all supported Minecraft versions.

## Must Read (March 2, 2025)
Because of the different needs of different players, I've categorized the needs in about 2 types:
- Wants the recipes to be simplified and productive
- Wants the recipes to be immersive

With that said, I can't ensure both automation styles in one mod... **So I'm going to release two separate versions of this mod!**
The ones that ends with "-EXP-SIMPLE" will have a simplified automation flow.
The ones that ends with "-EXP-COMPLEX" will have a complex, immersive automation flow (In Progress).

The Simplified Version is still very buggy, so, I'd suggest you to create a new world first, test it, find the bugs and report it to me and I'll drop a fix around 2 or 3 days. If you found bugs that has no impact on the gameplay or bugs that won't corrupt your saves, you can play it, but I will not guarantee it'll work smooth.

The Complex Version is currently under development, and will be released in around... a few months' time.

**Feedback is very important for me to improve this mod, so, I really hope I get some. If y'all want to provide feedback, you can do so in the Forms link, or just comment under one of my videos. Thank you to all who has downloaded and played this mod. I appreciate your support <3**

## Dependencies
- [Timeless and Classics: Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)
- [Create Mod for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

## Translations

The currently supported langauge translations are:
- English (en_US)
- Chinese Simplified (zh_CN)

***


# 机械动力：精制工艺 （中文, Chinese）

这是一个为机械动力添加TaC Zero物品自动化的模组，。***已更新至TaCZ 1.1.4版本，适用于Minecraft 1.20.1！***

## 必读（2026年4月16日）

应部分请求，我已将精制工艺模组 v0.4.4 中的配方提取出来，并打包成一个适用于 Minecraft 1.21.1 的数据包。对于困惑于永恒枪械没有 1.21.1 移植版的玩家：该数据包是专为非官方的永恒枪械 1.21.1 Forge/NeoForge 移植版制作的。

我现在正在搞一个面向永恒枪械模组1.1.7的精制工艺版本，未来不久应该会更新上传到这里。


## 必读（2025年3月2日）
由于不同玩家有不同的需求，我将这些需求大致分为两类：
- 希望简化并提高生产效率的配方
- 希望沉浸式的配方

因此，我无法在一个模组中同时满足这两种自动化风格......**所以我将发布两个独立版本的模组！**
以“-EXP-SIMPLE”结尾的版本将具有简化的自动化流程。
以“-EXP-COMPLEX”结尾的版本将具有复杂、沉浸式的自动化流程（正在开发中）。

简化版仍然存在很多bug，所以建议你先创建一个新世界进行测试，找到bug并报告给我，我会在2到3天内修复。如果你发现不影响游戏体验或不会破坏存档的bug，你可以继续游玩，但不保证它会运行顺畅。

复杂版目前正在开发中，预计将在几个月后发布。

**反馈对改进这个模组非常重要，所以我们非常希望得到一些反馈。如果你想提供反馈，可以通过表单链接提交，或者在我（Type32）的视频下评论。感谢大家下载和游玩此模组，我们非常感激大家的支持！<3**
